signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**[1][2]
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**[1][2]

The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple provides definitive regulatory clarity, removing a multi-year overhang that suppressed XRP's price and enabling institutional adoption, with XRP surging nearly 10% in the past week to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1].
